content: Hi, I'm Kit. I'm a Professional Rock Climber and Guide. I love animals and I have a pet dog named Rocky.
Hi Kit, nice to meet you. How's Rocky doing?
He's doing great, thanks for asking. I've been taking him on a lot of hikes lately and he loves it. I've also been learning Spanish in preparation for a move to Taiwan.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who is moving to Taiwan. What made you decide to make the move?
I've always been fascinated by the culture and the rock climbing opportunities there. I'm actually planning to move on November 1st, so I'm trying to get everything ready.
That's exciting. Have you thought about what you'll do with Rocky when you move?
Yeah, I've been thinking about it. I'm not sure if I'll be able to bring him with me, so I'm looking into options for him to stay with a friend or family member.
It's great that you're thinking ahead. Maybe you can also look into pet-friendly housing options in Taiwan.
That's a great idea. I'll have to look into it. By the way, I'm really into origami and stand-up comedy. I've been trying to learn how to make more complex origami designs.
Origami can be really challenging, but also really rewarding. Maybe you can find an origami community in Taiwan to connect with other enthusiasts.
Yeah, that's a great idea. I've also been trying to get into urban sketching. I find that it's a great way to relax and express my creativity.
